pageInit.name: ClientScriptContext_pageInit
pageInit.description: Provides the context for the pageInit entry point, which fires when a page completes loading or when a record is initialized.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record loaded on the page. Use this to read/write field values.

properties.name: mode
properties.description: The access mode: 'create', 'copy', or 'edit'.

fieldChanged.name: ClientScriptContext_fieldChanged
fieldChanged.description: Provides the context for the fieldChanged entry point, which fires when a field is changed by a user or client call.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist internal ID (empty string if a body field changed).

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The internal ID of the field that changed.

properties.name: line
properties.description: The line number (0-based) if the field is on a sublist. -1 for body fields.

properties.name: column
properties.description: The column number for matrix sublists. -1 otherwise.

postSourcing.name: ClientScriptContext_postSourcing
postSourcing.description: Provides the context for the postSourcing entry point, which fires when a field finishes sourcing information.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist ID (empty string for body fields).

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The field whose sourced value was just set.

lineInit.name: ClientScriptContext_lineInit
lineInit.description: Provides the context for the lineInit entry point, which fires when a user selects an existing line in a sublist to edit, or adds a new line.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist that was initialized.

validateField.name: ClientScriptContext_validateField
validateField.description: Provides the context for the validateField entry point, which fires when a field value is modified.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist ID (empty for body fields).

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The field being validated.

properties.name: line
properties.description: The line number if on a sublist.

properties.name: column
properties.description: The column number for matrix sublists.

validateLine.name: ClientScriptContext_validateLine
validateLine.description: Provides the context for the validateLine entry point, which fires before a sublist line is committed.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist being committed.

validateInsert.name: ClientScriptContext_validateInsert
validateInsert.description: Provides the context for the validateInsert entry point, which fires before a sublist line is inserted.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist where the line is being inserted.

validateDelete.name: ClientScriptContext_validateDelete
validateDelete.description: Provides the context for the validateDelete entry point, which fires before a sublist line is deleted.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record on the page.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: The sublist where the line is being deleted.

saveRecord.name: ClientScriptContext_saveRecord
saveRecord.description: Provides the context for the saveRecord entry point, which fires when the user clicks the Save button.

properties.name: currentRecord
properties.description: The current record about to be saved.

beforeLoad.name: UserEventContext_beforeLoad
beforeLoad.description: Provides the context for the beforeLoad entry point, which executes before a record is loaded into the UI.

properties.name: newRecord
properties.description: The record being loaded. Read-only in beforeLoad.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The user event type: 'create', 'edit', 'view', 'copy', 'print', 'email', 'quickview'.

properties.name: form
properties.description: The form object (N/ui/serverWidget). Use to add fields, buttons, tabs, and sublists.

properties.name: request
properties.description: The HTTP request that triggered this event (available only in UI context).

beforeSubmit.name: UserEventContext_beforeSubmit
beforeSubmit.description: Provides the context for the beforeSubmit entry point, which executes before a record goes to the database.

properties.name: newRecord
properties.description: The record with the new values (about to be saved).

properties.name: oldRecord
properties.description: The record with the previous values (before the edit). Null on create.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The user event type: 'create', 'edit', 'delete', 'xedit' (inline edit), 'approve', 'reject', 'cancel', 'pack', 'ship', 'dropship', 'specialorder', 'orderitems', 'paybills'.

afterSubmit.name: UserEventContext_afterSubmit
afterSubmit.description: Provides the context for the afterSubmit entry point, which executes immediately after a record is saved to the database.

properties.name: newRecord
properties.description: The record with the new (saved) values.

properties.name: oldRecord
properties.description: The record with the previous values. Null on create.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The user event type: 'create', 'edit', 'delete', 'xedit', 'approve', 'reject', 'cancel', etc.

execute.name: ScheduledScriptContext_execute
execute.description: Provides the context for the execute entry point of a Scheduled Script.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The invocation type: 'SCHEDULED' (from schedule) or 'ON_DEMAND' (manually triggered).

getInputData.name: MapReduceContext_getInputData
getInputData.description: Provides the context for the getInputData stage of a Map/Reduce script.

properties.name: isRestarted
properties.description: True if this is a restarted invocation (a previous attempt failed mid-execution).

map.name: MapReduceContext_map
map.description: Provides the context for the map stage of a Map/Reduce script.

properties.name: key
properties.description: The key of the current item from getInputData.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the current item (JSON string — use JSON.parse()).

properties.name: isRestarted
properties.description: True if this is a restarted invocation.

methods.name: write
methods.description: Writes a key/value pair to pass to the reduce stage.

params.name: value
params.description: The value (will be grouped by key in reduce)

reduce.name: MapReduceContext_reduce
reduce.description: Provides the context for the reduce stage of a Map/Reduce script.

properties.name: key
properties.description: The grouping key (from context.write() in the map stage).

properties.name: values
properties.description: Array of all values written with this key during the map stage.

properties.name: isRestarted
properties.description: True if this is a restarted invocation.

methods.name: write
methods.description: Writes a key/value pair to the output (accessible in summarize via context.output).

summarize.name: MapReduceContext_summarize
summarize.description: Provides the context for the summarize stage of a Map/Reduce script.

properties.name: dateCreated
properties.description: The date/time when the Map/Reduce job was created.

properties.name: seconds
properties.description: Total seconds the job ran.

properties.name: usage
properties.description: Total governance units consumed.

properties.name: concurrency
properties.description: Maximum number of queues used concurrently.

properties.name: yields
properties.description: Number of times the script yielded.

properties.name: isRestarted
properties.description: True if this is a restarted invocation.

properties.name: inputSummary
properties.description: Summary of the getInputData stage. Has .error property if it failed.

properties.name: mapSummary
properties.description: Summary of the map stage. Use .errors.iterator() to iterate errors.

properties.name: reduceSummary
properties.description: Summary of the reduce stage. Use .errors.iterator() to iterate errors.

properties.name: output
properties.description: Iterator over key/value pairs written in the reduce stage. Use .iterator().each().

onRequest.name: SuiteletContext_onRequest
onRequest.description: Provides the context for the onRequest entry point of a Suitelet.

properties.name: request
properties.description: The incoming HTTP request. Use .method to check GET vs POST, .parameters for query params, .body for POST body.

properties.name: response
properties.description: The HTTP response object. Use .write() to send HTML, .writePage() to render a serverWidget.Form, .renderPdf() to send PDF.

render.name: PortletContext_render
render.description: Provides the context for the render entry point of a Portlet.

properties.name: portlet
properties.description: The portlet object. Use to add fields, rows, and content to the dashboard widget.

properties.name: column
properties.description: The dashboard column the portlet is placed in (1, 2, or 3).

properties.name: entityId
properties.description: The internal ID of the entity if the portlet is on an entity dashboard.

get.name: RestletContext_get
get.description: Provides the context for the GET entry point of a RESTlet. The parameter contains the request parameters as key/value pairs.

properties.name: requestParams
properties.description: If the RESTlet parameter is named as an object, it contains all query string parameters.

post.name: RestletContext_post
post.description: Provides the context for the POST entry point of a RESTlet. The parameter contains the parsed request body.

properties.name: requestBody
properties.description: The parsed request body. If Content-Type is application/json, this is a parsed object.

put.name: RestletContext_put
put.description: Provides the context for the PUT entry point of a RESTlet. The parameter contains the parsed request body.

properties.name: requestBody
properties.description: The parsed request body. If Content-Type is application/json, this is a parsed object.

delete.name: RestletContext_delete
delete.description: Provides the context for the DELETE entry point of a RESTlet. The parameter contains the request parameters.

properties.name: requestParams
properties.description: The query string parameters as key/value pairs.

each.name: MassUpdateContext_each
each.description: Provides the context for the each entry point of a Mass Update script.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The record type of the current record.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The internal ID of the current record.

onAction.name: WorkflowActionContext_onAction
onAction.description: Provides the context for the onAction entry point of a Workflow Action script.

properties.name: newRecord
properties.description: The record in its current (new) state.

properties.name: oldRecord
properties.description: The record in its previous state.

properties.name: form
properties.description: The form object (if available).

properties.name: type
properties.description: The action type.

properties.name: workflowId
properties.description: The internal ID of the workflow that triggered this action.
